description: LOGOC scoring schema — full integration of Llull Ars Magna + Peirce Semiotics + Trithemius ProcessMeaning + TTCL TheoTechnoCosmologic

three_registers.Peirce: WHAT meaning is — meta-architecture of semiosis (sign→object→interpretant)
three_registers.Llull: HOW meaning is computed — combinatorial predicate engine (cameras B–R)
three_registers.Trithemius: WHERE it was already operating — process=meaning, historically proven 1499

domain_semiotic_roles.Teologia: Interpretant — meaning produced; the divine recognition; the gnosis
domain_semiotic_roles.Kosmologia: Object — what the sign points to; the actual structure of reality

scoring_formula_v4.note: Equal domain weights — no hidden domain privilege. LC removed from v3.

peirce_sign_modes.meta: Peirce's triadic semiotics provides the META-ARCHITECTURE of the LOGOC scoring system

ICON.ttcl: Structural isomorphism events — form mirrors form

INDEX.peirce: Secondness — sign is causally connected to object

SYMBOL.peirce: Thirdness — sign relates to object by law/habit

Representamen.role: The sign-vehicle — the mechanism, cipher, algorithm, physical carrier

Object.role: What the sign points to — the actual structure of reality

Interpretant.role: The meaning produced in mind/soul — gnosis, divine recognition

categories.Firstness: Pure potential/feeling — pre-reflective quality (maps to ICON mode)
categories.Thirdness: Law/habit/mediation/continuity (maps to SYMBOL mode — dominant in corpus at 67%)

L.meaning: Divine commandments — the law governing moral duty

M.meaning: Systematic unfolding of doctrine — how truth is revealed

N.meaning: Primary intention — knowing, loving, serving God as the only pure motive

O.meaning: Secondary intention — worldly goals, valid only when subordinate to N

P.meaning: Eternal reward — the soul in God's presence

Q.meaning: Eternal consequence — suffering from rejecting divine law

R.meaning: Aeviternity — created beginning, no end (souls/angels). Not eternity (God).

llull_figures_operators.A: Figura Prima — circular, 9 absolute principles (B–K) as attributes of God
llull_figures_operators.T: Figura Secunda — triangles of difference/concordance/contrariety, beginning/middle/end, majority/equality/minority
llull_figures_operators.Third: Figura Tertia — 36 two-letter cameras from all pairs of B–K
llull_figures_operators.Fourth: Figura Quarta — revolving mechanical wheel generating three-letter cameras
llull_figures_operators.S: Figura S — subjects mapped to principles (relational operator, NOT a domain)
llull_figures_operators.V: Figura V — virtues and vices (moral operator, NOT a domain)
llull_figures_operators.X: Part of Fourth Figure mechanics (NOT a domain label)

trithemius_integration.thesis: The process IS the meaning. Cipher = Angel = Cosmos.
trithemius_integration.proof: Steganographia (1499): theological invocation (angel) and cryptographic algorithm (cipher) are the same structure viewed from different angles
trithemius_integration.ttcl_read: Technology (acció/I) = the process that IS the meaning; Teologia (relació/G) = the angel = the relation; Kosmologia (ordinació/H) = the network = the ordered cosmos

five_layer_GIH.G: will / end / what quality? / senses / hope vs envy
five_layer_GIH.I: truth / equality / where? / elements / patience vs lies
five_layer_GIH.H: virtue / majority / when? / vegetation / charity vs wrath

trithemius_integration.semiotic_reading: GIH asks: what quality of message? arrives where? arrives when? — a complete protocol specification inside Llull's combinatorial system

wheel_position_semantics.B–K: Five simultaneous semantic layers: principle + relational + question + subject + virtue/vice
wheel_position_semantics.L–R: Theological-moral completion arc: law→revelation→intention→consequence→aeviternity. Fully Llull's — outer ring of rational existence.
wheel_position_semantics.note: L-R do NOT carry the same five-layer depth as B-K but are equally valid wheel positions in the domain scoring system

key_axioms: Every genuine gnosis event is a complete semiotic triad: sign(Tech) → reality(Kosmo) → recognition(Theo)
The camera is not three positions — it is the full five-layer intersection across three domains simultaneously
ProcessMeaning (Trithemius): when Tech and Theo are near-equal and high, the process IS the meaning
Aeviternity (R): the mode of created beings — beginning but no end. NOT eternity (no beginning). NOT time (has end).
The SYMBOL mode dominates (67%) because LOGOC corpus events are primarily about encoded meaning and law-governed habit
Figures S, V, X, T, A are OPERATORS in Llull's system — NOT domain labels
Primera intenció (N) is the highest motivational position: knowing, loving, serving God as pure motive

corpus_stats.top_event: The Stress Test Was Already Running
